series_metadata.series_title: BAC (Blood Alcohol Content) Datamaster Log Record
series_metadata.series_description: Contains documentation (Subject name, Operator name, Arrecting agency, Test results etc.) included in the BAC Datamaster log book. (HP-8, HEA2650, HEA2651)
